title: Mr. Meh's Extra Items
description: More items with little correlation to each other or balancing made for having fun and enhancing the survival experience.
body:
# Mr. Meh's Extra Items
More items with little correlation to each other or balancing made for having fun and enhancing the survival experience. 
![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b33da5cb082971a149a81de13c6f0936526a02e_0.webp)

# Description
This is a datapack that adds over 10 new items to the game. Most of the items added come from random ideas or inspiration from other games/media. They range from mostly weapons to some movement tools

# Notes
- The file contains both the resource pack and the datapack meaning that you need two copies of the file, one to put in your resource pack folder, and one to put in the world's datapack folder.
